TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == kakaliman == Mong-low-wi-yaŤíôÁĺÖÁ∂≠šļě Mong-low-wi-ya "Ing a kamu Monrovia /m…ôn'ro ävi…ô/" anucaay nipabelin Men-low-wi-ya han, nu satipan Bey-cow-Lay-pi-zoy-ya kapulung a angangan nu tukay, namahiza u Lay-pi-zoy-ya t uku satabakiay a tukay. na samihmihcaan sa manganganyaw la'tus tu ku hekay nu tukay. uyni tukay a kezay angangan miida tu minatu, uyni a minatu angangan u Amilika a hitay i sakatusa nu kitakit a angangayawan misahebal patizeng. angangan patahkal tu tuud pasu suka atu mukin ba'tu. tizaaay mikawaw micunus tu uyaanay a zayliw, tinaku amutu, malasimalay kakanan, lingga, wa, luma'ay a aikenan, sapayu a kusi, uyni a minatu yadah ku sulu atu nisanga'an taneng pawapen tu sakawawan a sapisakapah tu balungha. a niyazu' micapi tu satip bayu, nu Lay-pi-ya a angangan nu minatu,2008 a mihcaan nipikinsa iza ku 970,824 ku tademaw, macalap ku hamin nu Lay-pi-ya 29% pasentu ku tademaw, uyni a kanatal nu sakatuuday a tademaw nu tukay. 1816 a mihcaan, amipaeneng tu mapahulakay nu lumeni'ay a tademaw a tubang nu Amilika, pahuyayan sa pitizeng tu ziyazu', midemungay a Amilika sye-huy mipadang tu saayaway nu lumeni'aa tademAw panukas i Bey-cow. 1822 a mihcaan sakatusa panukasan a lumeni'ay a tademaw, mapaeneng I Mey-su-la-tu-cyaw cacay singanganay tu "Christopolis" mapulung mueneng tina lala'an. 1824 a mihcaan a pikining tu tawyaay kalamkam sa amicukel tu midebungay a undu Amilika a Cong-tung ci Can-mu-s.Men-low tiniay a kitizaan pangangan han tu Men-low-wi-ya. 185 a mihcaan, midebungay a Amilikasye-huy itini mikawaw tu nu hulic a kalecapu, uyni a kalecapuan saayaway a hulic mala zikuz nu Lay-pi-zuy-ya mapulungay kanatal a patizeng. 20 a mihcaan tu saayaway, Mong-low-wi-ya malatusa misanga' tu zumaay atu Amilika tu nutimulan misengi tu mey-sang nu Lay-pi-zoy-ya a tademaw a kitizaan atu angangan kitizaan nu Ke-lu, uyni a kitizaan u tademaw pasu Pa-long,Ke-lye-pow a tademaw atu zuma cayay kakatuuday a binacadan. kanahatu saayaway me-sang Lay-pi-zoy-ya macalap ku pangkiw tu nu tademaw, nika zikuz tizaay a binacudan haymaw satu malimad tayza i Mong-low-wi-ya nu pikilim tu sakawawan. i saayaway atu sakatusa a ngangayaw nu Lay-pi-zoy-ya, Mong-low-wi-ya pihacedng ku kapeci, mahaminay malawpes ku nisanga'an. 2002 a mihcaan Lay-man.Ku-pow-wi misakaput tu Lay-pi-zoy-ya as tatayna misatabaki lihalay a kawaw, uyni a undu sakay sakatusa a ngangayaw i 2003 a mihcaan a pahezek, uyni a kanatal atu Bey-cow saayaway a tatayna a cong-tung ci Ay-lon.Can-sen.se-li-bu. .
S.PHON: == kakar~…ĺiman == moŇč-r~…ĺow-wi-ja**** moŇč-r~…ĺow-wi-ja "iŇč a kamu monro*ia /m…ôn Ē~ °ro**i…ô/" anu ¶aaj nipab…ôr~…ĺin m…ôn-r~…ĺow-wi-ja ńßan, nu satipan b…ô- ¶ow-r~…ĺaj-pi-zoj-ja kapur~…ĺuŇč a aŇčaŇčan nu tukaj, namańßiza u r~…ĺaj-pi-zoj-ja t uku satabakiaj a tukaj. na samińßmińß ¶aan sa maŇčaŇčanjaw r~…ĺa Ē~ °tus tu ku ńß…ôkaj nu tukaj. ujni tukaj a k…ôzaj aŇčaŇčan miida tu minatu, ujni a minatu aŇčaŇčan u amir~…ĺika a ńßitaj i sakatusa nu kitakit a aŇčaŇčajawan misańß…ôbar~…ĺ patiz…ôŇč. aŇčaŇčan patańßkar~…ĺ tu tuud pasu suka atu mukin ba Ē~ °tu. tizaaaj mikawaw mi ¶unus tu ujaanaj a zajr~…ĺiw, tinaku amutu, mar~…ĺasimar~…ĺaj kakanan, r~…ĺiŇčga, wa, r~…ĺuma Ē~ °aj a aik…ônan, sapaju a kusi, ujni a minatu jadańß ku sur~…ĺu atu nisaŇča Ē~ °an tan…ôŇč pawap…ôn tu sakawawan a sapisakapańß tu bar~…ĺuŇčńßa. a nijazu Ē~ ° mi ¶api tu satip baju, nu r~…ĺaj-pi-ja a aŇčaŇčan nu minatu,**** a mińß ¶aan nipikinsa iza ku ***,*** ku tad…ômaw, ma ¶ar~…ĺap ku ńßamin nu r~…ĺaj-pi-ja **% pas…ôntu ku tad…ômaw, ujni a kanatar~…ĺ nu sakatuudaj a tad…ômaw nu tukaj. **** a mińß ¶aan, amipa…ôn…ôŇč tu mapańßur~…ĺakaj nu r~…ĺum…ôni Ē~ °aj a tad…ômaw a tubaŇč nu amir~…ĺika, pańßujajan sa pitiz…ôŇč tu zijazu Ē~ °, mid…ômuŇčaj a amir~…ĺika sj…ô-ńßuj mipadaŇč tu saajawaj nu r~…ĺum…ôni Ē~ °aa tad…ômaw panukas i b…ô- ¶ow. **** a mińß ¶aan sakatusa panukasan a r~…ĺum…ôni Ē~ °aj a tad…ômaw, mapa…ôn…ôŇč i m…ô-su-r~…ĺa-tu- ¶jaw ¶a ¶aj siŇčaŇčanaj tu " ¶ńßristopor~…ĺis" mapur~…ĺuŇč mu…ôn…ôŇč tina r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °an. **** a mińß ¶aan a pikiniŇč tu tawjaaj kar~…ĺamkam sa ami ¶uk…ôr~…ĺ tu mid…ôbuŇčaj a undu amir~…ĺika a ¶oŇč-tuŇč ¶i ¶an-mu-s.m…ôn-r~…ĺow tiniaj a kitizaan paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu m…ôn-r~…ĺow-wi-ja. *** a mińß ¶aan, mid…ôbuŇčaj a amir~…ĺikasj…ô-ńßuj itini mikawaw tu nu ńßur~…ĺi ¶ a kar~…ĺ…ô ¶apu, ujni a kar~…ĺ…ô ¶apuan saajawaj a ńßur~…ĺi ¶ mar~…ĺa zikuz nu r~…ĺaj-pi-zuj-ja mapur~…ĺuŇčaj kanatar~…ĺ a patiz…ôŇč. ** a mińß ¶aan tu saajawaj, moŇč-r~…ĺow-wi-ja mar~…ĺatusa misaŇča Ē~ ° tu zumaaj atu amir~…ĺika tu nutimur~…ĺan mis…ôŇči tu m…ô-saŇč nu r~…ĺaj-pi-zoj-ja a tad…ômaw a kitizaan atu aŇčaŇčan kitizaan nu k…ô-r~…ĺu, ujni a kitizaan u tad…ômaw pasu pa-r~…ĺoŇč,k…ô-r~…ĺj…ô-pow a tad…ômaw atu zuma ¶ajaj kakatuudaj a bina ¶adan. kanańßatu saajawaj m…ô-saŇč r~…ĺaj-pi-zoj-ja ma ¶ar~…ĺap ku paŇčkiw tu nu tad…ômaw, nika zikuz tizaaj a bina ¶udan ńßajmaw satu mar~…ĺimad tajza i moŇč-r~…ĺow-wi-ja nu pikir~…ĺim tu sakawawan. i saajawaj atu sakatusa a ŇčaŇčajaw nu r~…ĺaj-pi-zoj-ja, moŇč-r~…ĺow-wi-ja pińßa ¶…ôdŇč ku kap…ô ¶i, mańßaminaj mar~…ĺawp…ôs ku nisaŇča Ē~ °an. **** a mińß ¶aan r~…ĺaj-man.ku-pow-wi misakaput tu r~…ĺaj-pi-zoj-ja as tatajna misatabaki r~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj a kawaw, ujni a undu sakaj sakatusa a ŇčaŇčajaw i **** a mińß ¶aan a pańß…ôz…ôk, ujni a kanatar~…ĺ atu b…ô- ¶ow saajawaj a tatajna a ¶oŇč-tuŇč ¶i aj-r~…ĺon. ¶an-s…ôn.s…ô-r~…ĺi-bu. .
S.FORM: == kakaliman == Mong-low-wi-yaŤíôÁĺÖÁ∂≠šļě Mong-low-wi-ya "Ing a kamu Monrovia /m…ôn'ro ävi…ô/" anucaay nipabelin Men-low-wi-ya han, nu satipan Bey-cow-Lay-pi-zoy-ya kapulung a angangan nu tukay, namahiza u Lay-pi-zoy-ya t uku satabakiay a tukay. na samihmihcaan sa manganganyaw la'tus tu ku hekay nu tukay. uyni tukay a kezay angangan miida tu minatu, uyni a minatu angangan u Amilika a hitay i sakatusa nu kitakit a angangayawan misahebal patizeng. angangan patahkal tu tuud pasu suka atu mukin ba'tu. tizaaay mikawaw micunus tu uyaanay a zayliw, tinaku amutu, malasimalay kakanan, lingga, wa, luma'ay a aikenan, sapayu a kusi, uyni a minatu yadah ku sulu atu nisanga'an taneng pawapen tu sakawawan a sapisakapah tu balungha. a niyazu' micapi tu satip bayu, nu Lay-pi-ya a angangan nu minatu,2008 a mihcaan nipikinsa iza ku 970,824 ku tademaw, macalap ku hamin nu Lay-pi-ya 29% pasentu ku tademaw, uyni a kanatal nu sakatuuday a tademaw nu tukay. 1816 a mihcaan, amipaeneng tu mapahulakay nu lumeni'ay a tademaw a tubang nu Amilika, pahuyayan sa pitizeng tu ziyazu', midemungay a Amilika sye-huy mipadang tu saayaway nu lumeni'aa tademAw panukas i Bey-cow. 1822 a mihcaan sakatusa panukasan a lumeni'ay a tademaw, mapaeneng I Mey-su-la-tu-cyaw cacay singanganay tu "Christopolis" mapulung mueneng tina lala'an. 1824 a mihcaan a pikining tu tawyaay kalamkam sa amicukel tu midebungay a undu Amilika a Cong-tung ci Can-mu-s.Men-low tiniay a kitizaan pangangan han tu Men-low-wi-ya. 185 a mihcaan, midebungay a Amilikasye-huy itini mikawaw tu nu hulic a kalecapu, uyni a kalecapuan saayaway a hulic mala zikuz nu Lay-pi-zuy-ya mapulungay kanatal a patizeng. 20 a mihcaan tu saayaway, Mong-low-wi-ya malatusa misanga' tu zumaay atu Amilika tu nutimulan misengi tu mey-sang nu Lay-pi-zoy-ya a tademaw a kitizaan atu angangan kitizaan nu Ke-lu, uyni a kitizaan u tademaw pasu Pa-long,Ke-lye-pow a tademaw atu zuma cayay kakatuuday a binacadan. kanahatu saayaway me-sang Lay-pi-zoy-ya macalap ku pangkiw tu nu tademaw, nika zikuz tizaay a binacudan haymaw satu malimad tayza i Mong-low-wi-ya nu pikilim tu sakawawan. i saayaway atu sakatusa a ngangayaw nu Lay-pi-zoy-ya, Mong-low-wi-ya pihacedng ku kapeci, mahaminay malawpes ku nisanga'an. 2002 a mihcaan Lay-man.Ku-pow-wi misakaput tu Lay-pi-zoy-ya as tatayna misatabaki lihalay a kawaw, uyni a undu sakay sakatusa a ngangayaw i 2003 a mihcaan a pahezek, uyni a kanatal atu Bey-cow saayaway a tatayna a cong-tung ci Ay-lon.Can-sen.se-li-bu. .

kapur~…ĺuŇč a aŇčaŇčan nu tukaj, namańßiza u r~…ĺaj-pi-zoj-ja t uku satabakiaj a tukaj. na samińßmińß ¶aan sa maŇčaŇčanjaw r~…ĺa Ē~ °tus tu ku ńß…ôkaj nu tukaj. ujni tukaj a k…ôzaj aŇčaŇčan miida tu pańßujajan sa pitiz…ôŇč tu zijazu Ē~ °, mid…ômuŇčaj a amir~…ĺika sj…ô-ńßuj mipadaŇč tu saajawaj nu r~…ĺum…ôni Ē~ °aa tad…ômaw panukas i b…ô- ¶ow. **** a mińß ¶aan sakatusa panukasan a r~…ĺum…ôni Ē~ °aj a tad…ômaw, mapa…ôn…ôŇč i m…ô-su-r~…ĺa-tu- ¶jaw ¶a ¶aj siŇčaŇčanaj tu " ¶ńßristopor~…ĺis" mapur~…ĺuŇč mu…ôn…ôŇč tina r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °an. **** a mińß ¶aan a pikiniŇč tu tawjaaj kar~…ĺamkam sa ami ¶uk…ôr~…ĺ tu mid…ôbuŇčaj a undu amir~…ĺika a ¶oŇč-tuŇč ¶i ¶an-mu-s.m…ôn-r~…ĺow tiniaj a kitizaan paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu m…ôn-r~…ĺow-wi-ja. *** a mińß ¶aan, mid…ôbuŇčaj a amir~…ĺikasj…ô-ńßuj itini mikawaw tu nu ńßur~…ĺi ¶ a kar~…ĺ…ô ¶apu, ujni a kar~…ĺ…ô ¶apuan saajawaj a ńßur~…ĺi ¶ mar~…ĺa zikuz nu r~…ĺaj-pi-zuj-ja mapur~…ĺuŇčaj kanatar~…ĺ a patiz…ôŇč. ** a mińß ¶aan tu saajawaj, moŇč-r~…ĺow-wi-ja mar~…ĺatusa misaŇča Ē~ ° tu zumaaj atu amir~…ĺika tu nutimur~…ĺan mis…ôŇči tu m…ô-saŇč nu r~…ĺaj-pi-zoj-ja a tad…ômaw a kitizaan atu aŇčaŇčan kitizaan nu k…ô-r~…ĺu, ujni a kitizaan u tad…ômaw pasu pa-r~…ĺoŇč,k…ô-r~…ĺj…ô-pow a tad…ômaw atu zuma ¶ajaj kakatuudaj a bina ¶adan. kanańßatu saajawaj m…ô-saŇč r~…ĺaj-pi-zoj-ja ma ¶ar~…ĺap ku paŇčkiw tu nu tad…ômaw, nika zikuz tizaaj a bina ¶udan ńßajmaw satu mar~…ĺimad tajza i moŇč-r~…ĺow-wi-ja nu pikir~…ĺim tu sakawawan. i saajawaj atu sakatusa a ŇčaŇčajaw nu r~…ĺaj-pi-zoj-ja, moŇč-r~…ĺow-wi-ja pińßa ¶…ôdŇč ku kap…ô ¶i, mańßaminaj mar~…ĺawp…ôs ku nisaŇča Ē~ °an. **** a mińß ¶aan r~…ĺaj-man.ku-pow-wi misakaput tu r~…ĺaj-pi-zoj-ja as tatajna misatabaki r~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj a kawaw, ujni a undu sakaj sakatusa a ŇčaŇčajaw i **** a mińß ¶aan a pańß…ôz…ôk, ujni a kanatar~…ĺ atu b…ô- ¶ow saajawaj a tatajna a ¶oŇč-tuŇč ¶i aj-r~…ĺon. ¶an-s…ôn.s…ô-r~…ĺi-bu. .
